name: Nicholas Payton
abstract: Nicholas Payton (born September 26, 1973) is an American trumpet player and multi-instrumentalist. A Grammy Award winner, he is from New Orleans, Louisiana.

concerts.label: JVC Jazz Festival: The Dizzy Gillespie United Nation Orchestra
JVC Jazz Festival: A Tribute to "Trane"
Carnegie Hall Jazz Band: The New Legacy

about_quotes.speaker: David Torkanowsky
about_quotes.evidence: As a matter of fact I had a group with Zigaboo, George Porter on bass, Nicholas Payton and myself. We called it Fleur Debris.
about_quotes.doc_title: David Torkanowsky interviewed by Monk Rowe, New Hartford, New York, September 26, 2019

about_quotes.speaker: Carl Allen
about_quotes.evidence: I produced some in effect first recordings with Nicholas Payton, Roy Hargrove, Cyrus Chestnut...
about_quotes.doc_title: Carl Allen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Atlanta, Georgia, January 4, 2013

about_quotes.speaker: Alvin Queen
about_quotes.evidence: And in the trumpet section Nicholas Payton was on trumpet... So it was a good tour.
about_quotes.doc_title: Alvin Queen interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, August 23, 1997 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Randy Sandke
about_quotes.evidence: So we put on a concert where we played them, Nicholas Payton and myself.
about_quotes.doc_title: Randy Sandke interviewed by Monk Rowe, Aspen, Colorado, October 10, 1997

about_quotes.speaker: Jason Palmer
about_quotes.evidence: I knew Clifford Brown’s playing... and Nicholas Payton. My trumpet player in high school introduced me to the music of Nicholas Payton. We listened to “Gumbo Nouveau” and “Whoopin’ Blues” was one of my first transcriptions. I transcribed him.
about_quotes.doc_title: Jason Palmer interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, May 2, 2025

about_quotes.speaker: Phoebe Jacobs and Jackie Harris
about_quotes.evidence: they were all inspired by Louis. You can’t do anything in music that Louis hasn’t played. ... Then look at Nicholas Payton, so Nicholas’s father, Walter Payton, you could say he’s a traditional jazz artist
about_quotes.doc_title: Phoebe Jacobs and Jackie Harris interviewed by Monk Rowe, Rome, New York, August 21, 2006
